literature_note: Unique to bacteria. Enolpyruvyl transferase family has no close human member.
LPS pathway is absent in humans. LpxC has no human counterpart.
Human mitochondrial SAM50 is a distant homolog (~15% identity). Both are beta-barrel assembly machinery.
FtsZ is ancestrally related to eukaryotic tubulin. ~10-17% sequence identity but structural homology exists.
MEP pathway (non-mevalonate) is absent in humans. Humans use mevalonate pathway.
Human peroxisomal enoyl-CoA reductase has low but detectable homology.
Human acetyl-CoA carboxylase exists. ~20-25% identity in carboxyltransferase domain.
